title: centaurea filiformis
intro: Centaurea filiformis, also known as slender knapweed, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea filiformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
